response:
Here are 10 potential weaknesses of Dell from 2023, formatted to match the specific style and structure of your example:

1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from [Year] to [Year].
2. [Company Name]'s EPS down $[X.XX] in [Year] from previous year.
3. [Company Name] share prices down [X]% from [Year] to [Year].
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product category, personal computers.
5. Total liabilities increased from $[X,XXX,XXX,XXX] to $[X,XXX,XXX,XXX] from [Year] to [Year].
6. [Company Name] produced [X.X]% fewer units of consumer laptops in the first half of [Year] as a result of weak demand from retail and the education sector due to the post-pandemic market correction.
7. [Competitor Name] enterprise server division sales up [X]% from [Year] to [Year] while [Company Name] has no comparable growth in that specific segment.
8. [Competitor Name] achieved its goal to provide carbon-neutral manufacturing in [X]% of its facilities by [Year]. [Company Name]'s facilities have no comparable carbon-neutral certification.
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during fiscal year [Year].
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from antitrust charges to environmental protection violations.
